title: Crème Brûlée
description: Mother’s Day calls for a touch of luxury — our Crème Brûlée body scrub is enriched with sugar to scrub and soften and vanilla to keep you sweet!
ingredients: Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil (Apricot Kernel Oil)
Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract (Tonka Seed Extract)

images.alt:
Crème Brûlée. A neatly smeared swatch of 
thick, ivory-coloured body scrub with a golden-brown textured topping product. The swatched cream has a glossy, slightly granular appearance with visible peaks and ridges.

A person with wet, dark hair stands under a shower spray against a background of light green tiles, holding a black pot of "Crème Brûlée" Body Scrub. The scene is framed by blurred green foliage and flowers in the foreground.

Wet hands hold an open pot of "Crème Brûlée" Body Scrub against a green tiled shower background. Fingers dip into the container to scoop out the product, which the label describes as being infused with "almond oil and orange blossom honey water".

A person stands under a shower stream against a background of mint green tiles and flowers, massaging Crème Brûlée Body Scrub into their wet arm. A bottle of "Rose Jam" Shower Gel is visible on the shelf in the background.

Two wet hands hold an open pot of "Crème Brûlée" Body Scrub under a shower stream against a background of green tiles and flowers. One hand displays a scooped chunk of the thick, golden-brown granular scrub to show its texture.
Wet, soapy hands massage "Crème Brûlée" Body Scrub onto an arm under a shower stream. The lathering action takes place against a background of mint green tiles and soft-focus flowers.

A close-up, full-frame shot displays the texture of the "Crème Brûlée" Body Scrub. The creamy, light brown mixture is spread into thick, wavy ridges, with small exfoliating granules visible throughout the paste.
